hints.text: Chinese SAR (counts as China); coverage only **Gen2** — some of the **oldest**, so extra washed-out & overexposed (a tell in itself)
Plates **black w/ white text** (long or square)
Grey cylindrical lamp posts with a **black-painted bottom** (Hong Kong's similar posts lack the black bottom)
**Chinese + Portuguese** (former Portuguese colony) — Portuguese common on storefronts
White street signs w/ a **blue border** around Chinese + Portuguese text — unique to Macau
**Casinos & gambling ads** everywhere (kitsch; some newer ones under construction in the old Gen2); dense apartments north, hilly rural south
